name: scrub_time
description: Move the map's timeline scrubber to a specific hour so the operator sees the forecast at that time of day. Pass the hour as an integer 0-23 (normalise spoken times yourself: '2am' -> 2, '2pm' -> 14, 'midnight' -> 0, 'half eight in the evening' -> 20). Call whenever the operator asks to jump to, show, or scrub to a time.

hour.description: Hour of day to show on the map, as an integer 0-23 (0 = midnight, 23 = 11pm).
